summary: Two distinct bug categories found. Category A (engine setup) PC-side-fixed via junctions. Category B (addon.gproj syntax) requires Mac-side fix — bug-fixer is forbidden to modify mission files per PC_AGENT_BRIEF.

category_A_pc_fixed.name: Vanilla addon dependencies not in Workbench addon scan path
evidence: Engine scans only 3 dirs: active-mission-folder + cwd/addons (Tools\Workbench\addons → only 'core' from there) + %USERPROFILE%\Documents\my games\ArmaReforgerWorkbench\addons
Vanilla ArmaReforger.gproj lives in %ProgramFiles(x86)%\Steam\steamapps\common\Arma Reforger\addons\data\ — NOT scanned
Vanilla core.gproj (Enfusion core data, GUID 5614BBCCBB55ED1C) lives in same Steam-Game-addons — NOT scanned
fix_applied_by_pc: PRE-EXISTING junction also still present: %USERPROFILE%\Documents\my games\ArmaReforger\addons\_vanilla_data (Strategy A — wirkungslos, parent-level wird nicht gescannt; kann entfernt werden)
category_A_pc_fixed.verified: Workbench engine now lists all 3 addons in 'Available addons' section of console.log. Dependency resolution succeeds.

category_B_mac_required.name: Unknown keyword 'Author' in addon.gproj GameProject block
evidence: INIT (E): Unknown keyword/data 'Author' at offset 104(0x68) — night-recon
INIT (E): Unknown keyword/data 'Author' at offset 104(0x68) — day-assault
INIT (E): Unknown keyword/data 'Author' at offset 98(0x62) — fog-ambush
category_B_mac_required.root_cause: All 3 missions/<id>/output/addon.gproj contain the line: Author "AI-Native Mission Authoring System". Vanilla ArmaReforger.gproj reference does NOT have an Author field. The Enfusion engine GameProject schema does not include 'Author' as a recognized keyword.
category_B_mac_required.fix_proposal_for_mac: Remove the 'Author' line from each of the 3 addon.gproj files. If author attribution is desired, place it in a separate addon.gproj-adjacent comment block or in DISCLOSURE.md (where it already lives).
category_B_mac_required.blocker_status: Bug-fixer would not modify these files per Auto-Iteration rule in PC_AGENT_BRIEF: mission files are Mac-designer territory. Escalate.

next_actions: Mac-side: edit 3 addon.gproj files in missions/<id>/output/ — remove Author line
Mac-side: also fix the same in any backend/exporters/gproj.py template so re-generation does not reintroduce
PC-side (after Mac push): re-copy missions to addons/, re-run -validate (junctions are persistent setup, no rework)
abort_reason: max retries reached AND remaining fix is mac-side-only (out of pc-side scope)
